query: UPDATE projects SET startDate = DATE_SUB(startDate, INTERVAL 60 HOUR) WHERE startDate IS NOT NULL; UPDATE projects SET estimatedEndDate = DATE_SUB(estimatedEndDate, INTERVAL 60 HOUR) WHERE estimatedEndDate IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dCz1QvnpntshJi7.root --database jvZMyWuKFNHBGfG95CC7gr --execute UPDATE projects SET startDate = DATE_SUB(startDate, INTERVAL 60 HOUR) WHERE startDate IS NOT NULL; UPDATE projects SET estimatedEndDate = DATE_SUB(estimatedEndDate, INTERVAL 60 HOUR) WHERE estimatedEndDate IS NOT NULL;
